issuesFound.title: mobileNav toggle does not update aria-expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation open and close functions change the visual state of the drawer but do not update the aria-expanded attribute on the trigger button. Screen reader users cannot perceive the menu's expanded/collapsed state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2023: add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` after `_open = true;`. Line 2037: add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` after `_open = false;`.

issuesFound.title: siteSearch open/close functions do not update aria-expanded on search input
issuesFound.explanation: The search suggestion panel open/close functions change visibility but do not update aria-expanded on the search input (which acts as a combobox). Screen reader users cannot know if the suggestion list is expanded.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2734: add `setAttr(_inputEl, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` after `_searchState.open = true;`. Line 2743: add `setAttr(_inputEl, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` after `_searchState.open = false;`.

issuesFound.title: pricing toggle switch does not update aria-checked
issuesFound.explanation: The billing period toggle switch (role="switch") changes visual state but does not update the aria-checked attribute. Screen reader users cannot perceive the current state (month/year).
issuesFound.fix: Line 3018: add `setAttr(_toggleEl, 'aria-checked', period === 'year' ? 'true' : 'false');` inside the if (_toggleEl && _toggleTrack) block.

issuesFound.title: productFilter applyFilters does not announce results count via live region
issuesFound.explanation: When filters are applied, the product count changes dynamically, but no live region announcement is made. Screen reader users are not informed of the updated results count.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2885: add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.filterApplied ? STRINGS.announce.filterApplied(totalMatches) : \`Showing ${totalMatches} product${totalMatches !== 1 ? 's' : ''}\`);` inside the filterAnimation.run callback.

issuesFound.title: inlineValidator does not set aria-invalid on invalid fields
issuesFound.explanation: The inline validation function marks invalid fields with a CSS class but does not set aria-invalid="true". Screen reader users are not informed of the invalid state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 3545: add `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'true');` inside the else block (after `srUtils.markInvalid(field, errorEl);`). Also, in the valid block (Line 3539), add `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'false');`.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav drawer does not trap focus when open
issuesFound.explanation: When the mobile navigation drawer opens, focus is not trapped inside it. Keyboard users can tab out of the drawer into the background, causing loss of context and potential keyboard trap.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2015: add `_trap = createFocusTrap(_drawer); _trap.activate();` after `_lockScroll();`. Also, in the close function (Line 2037), add `if (_trap) _trap.deactivate();`.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav trigger does not have aria-expanded initialized on page load
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation trigger button does not have an initial aria-expanded value when the page loads (drawer is closed). Screen reader users may not know the initial collapsed state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2071: add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` after `_initialised = true;`.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu triggers do not have aria-expanded initialized on page load
issuesFound.explanation: Dropdown trigger buttons are registered but do not have an initial aria-expanded value set (panels are hidden on load). Screen reader users may not know the initial collapsed state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2245: add `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` after setting aria-controls.

issuesFound.title: contactForm validation does not set aria-invalid on invalid fields
issuesFound.explanation: The contact form validation function identifies invalid fields but does not set aria-invalid on them. Screen reader users are not informed of the invalid state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 3805: inside the loop, after `const result = inlineValidator.validate(field);`, add `if (result && !result.valid) setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'true'); else setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'false');`.

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion search filter does not announce results via live region on initial load
issuesFound.explanation: When the FAQ search filter is applied, a live region announcement is made, but the initial page load (empty query) does not announce the total number of questions. Screen reader users are not informed of the initial state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 3120: add a condition to announce the total count when query is empty: `if (!query) liveRegion.announce(\`${faqRegistry.count()} question${faqRegistry.count() !== 1 ? 's' : ''} available\`);`.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav open/close functions do not update aria-expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation's open(), close(), and toggle() functions change the visibility of the drawer but do not update the aria-expanded state on the trigger button. Screen reader users and keyboard users cannot perceive the menu's open/closed state, violating WCAG 4.1.2.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2500: add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` after `_open = true;`. Line 2520: add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` after `_open = false;`. Line 2540: update toggle() to set aria-expanded based on new state.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu _openInstance/_closeInstance do not update aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The dropdown menu controller's _openInstance and _closeInstance functions show/hide the panel but do not set aria-expanded on the associated trigger button. This breaks the ARIA disclosure pattern, leaving screen reader users unaware of the dropdown's state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2700: insert `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` after `inst.open = true;`. Line 2720: insert `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` after `inst.open = false;`.

issuesFound.title: pricing toggle switch does not update aria-checked
issuesFound.explanation: The billing period toggle switch (role="switch") changes between monthly and annual billing but does not update aria-checked. Screen reader users cannot perceive the current state of the switch, violating WCAG 4.1.2.
issuesFound.fix: Line 3200: In _syncToggleState, add `setAttr(_toggleEl, 'aria-checked', period === 'year' ? 'true' : 'false');` after the class toggle.

issuesFound.title: productFilter applyFilters does not announce results via live region
issuesFound.explanation: When product filters are applied, the updated card count and visible results are not announced to screen readers via an ARIA live region. Users with visual impairments may not know the filter has been applied or how many items are shown.
issuesFound.fix: Line 3800: In applyFilters, after `_updateCountBadge(totalMatches);`, add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.filterApplied ? STRINGS.announce.filterApplied(_productFilterState.activeCategory) : 'Filter applied, showing ' + totalMatches + ' products');`.

issuesFound.title: pricing setPeriod does not announce billing period change
issuesFound.explanation: The setPeriod function changes the displayed prices but does not announce the billing period change (e.g., "Monthly billing selected") to screen readers. Users relying on assistive technology may miss the update.
issuesFound.fix: Line 3100: In setPeriod, after `_syncToggleState(period);`, add `liveRegion.announce(period === 'year' ? STRINGS.announce.pricingAnnual : STRINGS.announce.pricingMonthly);`.

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion open/close functions do not announce state changes
issuesFound.explanation: Expanding or collapsing an FAQ item does not trigger a live region announcement. Screen reader users may not hear that the answer has appeared or disappeared, breaking WCAG 4.1.3.
issuesFound.fix: Line 4200: In open(), after setting aria-expanded, add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.faqOpened ? STRINGS.announce.faqOpened(item.question) : 'Expanded: ' + item.question);`. Line 4220: In close(), add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.faqClosed ? STRINGS.announce.faqClosed(item.question) : 'Collapsed: ' + item.question);`.

issuesFound.title: inlineValidator does not set aria-invalid on invalid fields
issuesFound.explanation: The inline validation system adds error classes and messages but does not set aria-invalid="true" on invalid input fields. Screen readers will not announce the invalid state, failing WCAG 3.3.1 and 4.1.2.
issuesFound.fix: Line 5000: In _renderResult, inside the else block (when result.valid is false), add `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'true');`. In the valid block, add `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'false');`.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav does not initialize aria-expanded on page load
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation trigger button lacks an initial aria-expanded attribute when the page loads (menu closed). Screen readers may not report the correct initial state, violating WCAG 4.1.2.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2600: In init(), after setting up _trigger and _drawer, add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`.

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu does not initialize aria-expanded on page load
issuesFound.explanation: Dropdown trigger buttons are not initialized with aria-expanded="false" when the page loads (panels hidden). Screen reader users will not know the initial collapsed state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2750: In register(), after setting aria-haspopup and aria-controls, add `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`.

issuesFound.title: Mobile nav toggle does not update aria-expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: The mobileNav.open() and mobileNav.close() functions change the visibility of the navigation drawer but do not update the aria-expanded attribute on the trigger button. Screen reader users will not be informed of the menu's expanded state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2153: add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` after `_open = true;`. Line 2169: add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` after `_open = false;`.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu toggle does not update aria-expanded on trigger
issuesFound.explanation: The dropdownMenu._openInstance() and _closeInstance() functions show/hide dropdown panels but do not set aria-expanded on the trigger button. This breaks the ARIA disclosure pattern for screen readers.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2257: add `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` after `inst.open = true;`. Line 2271: add `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` after `inst.open = false;`.

issuesFound.title: FAQ accordion open function does not set aria-expanded to true
issuesFound.explanation: The faqAccordion.open() function expands an FAQ answer panel but only toggles CSS classes; it does not set aria-expanded="true" on the trigger button. The close function sets it to false, but the open state is not communicated.
issuesFound.fix: Line 4065: add `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` after `item.open = true;`.

issuesFound.title: Product filter tabs do not update aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The productFilter._syncTabAriaStates() function toggles CSS classes on filter tab buttons but does not set aria-pressed. Users cannot perceive the active filter state via assistive technology.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2903: add `setAttr(btn, 'aria-pressed', String(isActive));` inside the forEach callback after `toggleClass(btn, CSS.active, isActive);`.

issuesFound.title: Pricing period change not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: The pricing.setPeriod() function updates visible price displays and emits an event, but does not announce the billing period change to screen readers via a live region. Users who rely on announcements may miss the update.
issuesFound.fix: Line 3238: add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.pricingAnnual || 'Prices switched to annual billing');` after `_pricingState.period = period;` (or conditionally for monthly).

issuesFound.title: Product filter results not announced via live region
issuesFound.explanation: The productFilter.applyFilters() function updates the visible product grid and emits an event, but does not announce the filter result count to screen readers. Users cannot perceive the dynamic content change.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2842: add `liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.filterApplied(_productFilterState.activeCategory) || `Showing ${totalMatches} products`);` inside the filterAnimation.run callback after `_updateCountBadge(totalMatches);`.

issuesFound.title: Form validation errors do not set aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: The inlineValidator._renderResult() function marks fields as invalid by adding CSS classes but does not set aria-invalid="true" on the input element. Screen readers will not announce the invalid state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 4470: add `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'true');` after `addClass(field, CSS.fieldInvalid);`. Line 4476: add `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'false');` after `addClass(field, CSS.fieldValid);`.

issuesFound.title: Mobile nav aria-expanded not initialised on page load
issuesFound.explanation: The mobileNav.init() function does not set an initial aria-expanded value on the navigation toggle button. The button's expanded state is undefined until first interaction, breaking the ARIA disclosure pattern.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2139: add `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` after `_initialised = true;`.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu aria-expanded not initialised on page load
issuesFound.explanation: The dropdownMenu.register() function sets up dropdown triggers but does not set an initial aria-expanded="false" on closed dropdowns. Screen readers may not correctly report the initial state.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2228: add `setAttr(trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` after `panel.setAttribute('hidden', '');`.

issuesFound.title: Focus indicator removed without replacement on :focus-visible
issuesFound.explanation: The global :focus-visible selector sets outline: none without providing a visible alternative such as a border or box-shadow. This removes the focus indicator for all interactive elements that do not have a more specific override, making keyboard navigation impossible for users.

issuesFound.explanation: The .btn:focus-visible selector sets outline: none without defining a border or box-shadow in the same block. This removes the focus indicator for buttons, preventing keyboard users from identifying the active element.

issuesFound.explanation: The .btn-icon class sets min-width and min-height to 20px, which is below the WCAG 2.2 minimum target size of 24px (SC 2.5.8). This makes the button difficult to activate for users with motor impairments.

issuesFound.title: Touch target below minimum size on input[type="checkbox"]
issuesFound.explanation: The checkbox input is explicitly sized to 20px by 20px, which is below the WCAG 2.2 minimum target size of 24px. This degrades the experience for users who rely on touch or assistive pointing devices.

issuesFound.title: Visually-hidden utility removes content from screen readers
issuesFound.explanation: The .sr-only utility class uses position: static and clip: auto, which fails to hide content visually. This breaks the intended functionality of hiding elements from sighted users while keeping them available to assistive technologies.

issuesFound.title: Focus indicator removed without replacement — feature card links

issuesFound.title: Focus indicator removed without replacement — FAQ accordion buttons

issuesFound.title: Touch target may be below recommended size — submenu links

issuesFound.title: Touch target may be below recommended size — search submit button

issuesFound.title: Touch target may be below recommended size — filter tab buttons

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markInvalid missing aria-invalid attribute
issuesFound.explanation: The form validation utility links error messages to fields via aria-describedby but does not set aria-invalid="true" on invalid fields. Screen readers cannot convey that the field contains an error.

issuesFound.title: mobileNav toggle missing aria-expanded and focus trap

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markValid not clearing aria-invalid

issuesFound.title: pricing.setPeriod missing live region announcement

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion open/close missing live region announcement

  Line close(): After `if (isFunction(_cfg.onClose)) { ... }` add `if (announceToSR !== false) liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.faqClosed ? STRINGS.faqClosed(item.question) : item.question + ' collapsed');`
